svg.text: single-step · oscillator · mode latch · synchronizer (no reset, no external clock)
U1 = NE556 (bipolar — R9/R10 4k7 pull-ups lift OUT1/OUT2 to the rail for HC inputs) · U2, U3 = 74HC00 · U4 = 74HC14 · U5 = 74HC273 (FF2/3 step sync, FF4/5 select resync; FF0/1/6/7 unused)
CLK = OSC·SEL_RUN_S + SP·SEL_STEP_S · every flip-flop clocks on /OSC (the falling edge of OSC), so selects and SP only change while OSC is low — no runt pulses, no interlocks needed

Educational core of blinky_clock_module.svg — the full module adds the DS1813 supervised reset (driving /CLR) and a jumpered can-oscillator input. With no reset, the '273 powers up in a random state and self-corrects on the first /OSC falling edge. 100 n decoupling per IC not shown.
